category_sources: source_facts.description says lazycut is a terminal-based video trimming TUI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives lazycut; source_facts.homepage is the official repository with the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies terminal-based video trimming; source_facts.executables lists the CLI.
